assertions.description: A requested device exposes a `features` GPUSupportedFeatures set including the 'core-features-and-limits' identifier.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();const ok=d.features && d.features.has && d.features.has('core-features-and-limits');d.destroy();return ok;})()

assertions.description: The adapter itself advertises the 'core-features-and-limits' feature.
Device limits include maxTextureDimension2D, one of the canonical core limits.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();const ok=typeof d.limits.maxTextureDimension2D==='number';d.destroy();return ok;})()
